change: existence-gate the search-modal form action attribute to /sitemap/
rationale: The form action attribute is invisible to sighted users and overridden by JS in all normal browsing; a screenshot before/after would show no difference. Evidence is a DOM/template comparison.

before.note: always /sitemap/ regardless of whether page exists — potential 404 on remote-theme consumers

after.note: gate passes because /sitemap/ is in the build; link preserved

conditions.scenario: remote-theme Pages consumer (/sitemap/ absent from build)

before.note: always /sitemap/ — no-JS form submission navigates to a 404

after.note: gate fails gracefully; '#' is a safe no-op (JS intercepts submit anyway)

mirrorGuards.description: Quick Links sitemap link gated on _sitemap_page via site.html_pages | where: url
Browse All Tags button gated on _tags_page; comment explicitly says it mirrors the footer Quick-Links guard
